    1. loadClass(String, boolean)

Class FilteringClassLoader

java.lang.Object
java.lang.ClassLoader
edu.iu.type.base.FilteringClassLoader
public class FilteringClassLoader extends ClassLoader
Prevents delegation to classes unrelated to the base platform.

Always allows delegation for class names for which IuObject.isPlatformName(String) returns true, except those starting with javax. or jakarta.. Optionally allows delegation to additional packages, including javax. and jakarta. packages. Allowed packages are explicit: i.e., allowing access to edu.iu doesn't allow access to edu.iu.type.
